headline: Wall Street Analysts Predict a 27.72% Upside in Amphenol (APH): Here's  What You Should Know
summary: The mean of analysts' price targets for Amphenol (APH) points to a 27.7% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Amphenol, Raises Price Target to $180
summary: Barclays  analyst Guy Hardwick   maintains Amphenol (NYSE:APH) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $175 to $180.
